commands.name: Refresh local synthetic event proof
commands.purpose: Regenerate synthetic checkout-incident events and the local dashboard before any live setup.

commands.name: Refresh local SPL-equivalent proof
commands.purpose: Confirm incident timeline, root-cause evidence, remediation ledger, MCP investigation context, and blast-radius rows exist before import.

commands.name: Validate Splunk app candidate
commands.purpose: Confirm the Simple XML dashboard and saved searches are locally valid before installing or copying them.

commands.name: Review live setup boundary
commands.purpose: Confirm scope, cost, credential, and data boundaries before any Splunk account or MCP action.

commands.name: Approve Splunk account and license use
commands.command: manual: create or use an approved Splunk account, trial, Cloud access, or Developer License
commands.purpose: Start live proof only after explicit account/license approval.

commands.name: Run approved ephemeral Docker Splunk proof
commands.purpose: After the user approves Splunk General Terms for this proof only, index the synthetic CSV in temporary Docker Splunk and capture live SPL plus local MCP SDK adapter readback.

commands.name: Create approved synthetic-data index
commands.command: manual: create index agentops_events for synthetic checkout-incident events only
commands.purpose: Keep live proof isolated from private workspace logs or customer data.

commands.name: Import synthetic CSV
commands.purpose: Load only the generated synthetic dataset used by the local proof.

commands.name: Install or copy Splunk app candidate
commands.command: manual: install or copy splunk_app\agentops_control_tower after reviewing app.conf, savedsearches.conf, and dashboard XML
commands.purpose: Expose the Control Tower dashboard without adding unreviewed apps or private data sources.

commands.name: Run live SPL evidence checks
commands.command: manual: run the incident timeline, root-cause evidence, remediation ledger, MCP investigation context, and blast-radius queries from submission\SPL_QUERIES.md
commands.purpose: Verify live Splunk results match the local query proof before strengthening claims.

commands.name: Configure Splunk MCP Server after approval
commands.command: manual: configure Splunk MCP Server with read-only approved scope for agentops_events
commands.purpose: Allow MCP-assisted investigation only inside the approved synthetic-data scope.

commands.name: Run MCP-assisted investigation
commands.command: manual: ask what caused the checkout incident, which services are affected, and which remediation needs human approval first; require cited event IDs plus evidence refs
commands.purpose: Capture the bonus-proof story without allowing external actions or secret access.

commands.name: Build proof capture manifest
commands.purpose: Freeze the required live proof capture slots, readback evidence, stop conditions, and claim-upgrade gate before any proof capture.

commands.name: Capture live proof safely
commands.command: manual: capture screenshots or recording of indexed CSV, live SPL results, and MCP answer with no tokens, account pages, or private paths visible
commands.purpose: Create evidence for the final demo only after the screen-safety review passes.

commands.name: Upgrade claim wording only after proof
commands.purpose: Re-check public copy before saying the project is verified through Splunk MCP Server.

boundary: This command plan is advisory/readback only. The plan builder does not create accounts, configure credentials, import data, install apps, connect MCP, capture screenshots, update claims, publish, upload, or submit anything.
approval_required: Explicit user approval is required before credential handling, official Splunk MCP Server configuration, dashboard/screenshot capture, or live-MCP claim wording changes.
